metaDescription: A CARSI and CCW operator course for HydraMaster and Sapphire Scientific truck-mounts in Australian configuration — safe operating procedures, carbon monoxide safety, road safety and servicing.
imageAlt: Operator running a petrol-engine truck-mount carpet cleaning unit from an Australian work van

og.title: Truckmount Operations — HydraMaster & Sapphire Scientific | CARSI
og.description: A CARSI continuing-education course, co-produced with Carpet Cleaners Warehouse, for operating petrol-engine HydraMaster and Sapphire Scientific truck-mounts in Australian configuration — safe operating procedures, carbon monoxide control, storage and road safety, maintenance, and a competency sign-off.

faq.q: Which machines does this truck-mount course cover?
faq.a: It is an operator course for petrol-engine HydraMaster and Sapphire Scientific truck-mount systems run in Australian configuration, covering their Australian specifications and set-up. The course opens with a machine-selection step so you follow the content for your unit.

faq.q: What safety topics does the course cover?
faq.a: Carbon monoxide is treated as the critical hazard within the safe operating procedures. The course also covers the manufacturer's truck-mount safety certificate, and storage, transport and road safety including load restraint, GVM, and fuel and chemical carriage.

faq.q: Is the course specific to Australia?
faq.a: Yes. It works from Australian configurations and specifications and the Australian regulatory map — the National Heavy Vehicle Regulator and state road rules, work health and safety, and pressure and fuel requirements — drawn from manufacturer manuals and Australian authorities.
Through a maintenance and servicing unit, a reference image catalogue and a knowledge check, then a final assessment with a trainer pre-flight verification gate and an operator competency sign-off.
